entries.statement: Manage the enterprise business glossary, including term authoring workflows, approval processes, linkage to catalog assets, and conflict resolution between competing definitions.
Develop and maintain the enterprise data and AI strategy, aligned to business objectives, with defined investment priorities, milestones, accountability assignments, and success metrics.
Lead selection, contracting, and performance oversight of strategic data and AI technology vendors and platform providers.
Establish and operate the enterprise data governance program, including council structure, policy library, stewardship network, data domain ownership registry, and governance metrics.
Conduct enterprise data maturity assessments against recognized frameworks and define improvement roadmaps with measurable milestones and accountable owners.
Establish and maintain the enterprise data catalog, business glossary, and metadata management program, ensuring discoverability, lineage visibility, and classification currency.
Establish post-deployment AI monitoring standards, including performance threshold definitions, drift detection protocols, incident reporting procedures, and remediation timelines.
Operate the Data Governance Council, including scheduling, agenda preparation, issue tracking, decision logging, and follow-through on action items.
Manage the enterprise data stewardship network, including steward onboarding, role clarity, tools access, and regular steward community engagement.
Produce and distribute regular data governance program status reports, including maturity progress, open issues, policy violations, and upcoming regulatory obligations.
Maintain the business glossary definitions, data asset catalog entries, and data lineage documentation for the assigned data domain.
Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representing the assigned domain's interests and escalating unresolved issues through established channels.
Review and approve data access requests, data sharing agreements, and data use authorizations for data assets within the assigned domain.
Conduct data and AI strategy engagements, including current state assessment, future state design, gap analysis, and roadmap development with defined milestones and investment estimates.
Process data access requests per defined procedures, including request validation, approval routing, provisioning, and access log documentation.
